data.content: Shipment review rolled back to ready_for_shipment. The shipped code is on main in both repos: knots merge 3fc70a7b0542 is at origin/main with successful GitHub Actions (CI, Repo Hygiene, Release, Changesets Version PR), and foolery merge 3afbd2f70345 has successful GitHub Actions (CI, Coverage Badge). I am not approving the parent yet because its prompt requires child knots to be handled first, and all children remain unreviewed: 09f2/e071 in shipment_review and 28b1/2aa3/2bc3/93c9/ed42 in ready_for_shipment_review.
